text: A Hezbollah commander describes battling Israel in Lebanon - NPR

text: Decades after a Texas mom's disappearance, a tip leads to the location of her secret grave - CBS News
fullText: Kimberly Langwell, a mom in Beaumont, Texas, had dinner plans with her teenage daughter and boyfriend on July 9, 1999 – but she never came home from work. It would take more than 20 years before one man's long-kept secret would expose her killer.
